news.title: Exordion is Now Live — Bravora Launched!
news.description: The day has come: Exordion opens today. Join hundreds of players exploring Bravora. New hunting grounds, bosses, and PvP arenas await!

news.title: Final Countdown — Bravora Opens Tomorrow!
news.description: 1 day left until the grand opening of Bravora. Make sure to download the latest client and prepare your characters!

news.title: Bravora Opens March 11 — Are You Ready?
news.description: Pre-registration is now open. Create your account and secure your character name for the launch of Bravora on March 11.

news.title: Daily Bosses & Crafting Systems Revealed
news.description: Discover the new Daily Boss system with unique drop tables and the Crafting & Rarity system. Check the wiki for full details.

news.title: Exordion Wiki — Spells, Runes & Systems
news.description: The full Exordion wiki is up with detailed guides on spells, runes, daily bosses, crafting, and the rarity system.
